MINI-MINUTES FOR DEC-04-2002 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO VACATE ORDER RE: SANCTIONS ISSUED TO ANTHONY L. HEAD, ESQ., ON 12/4/02 IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 IS SCHEDULED THIS DAY. THERE BEING NO APPEARANCE OR AN OBJECTION TENTATIVE RULING TO GRANT MOTION IS ADOPTED. MOTION IS ORDERED GRANTED. SANCTIONS ARE ORDERED VACATED. MOVING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WITHIN FIVE DAYS. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: LETICIA PEREZ. (212)
